visual_findings.label: Facial Expression
visual_findings.summary: Neutral to slightly pensive expression; minimal emotional fluctuation.
visual_findings.evidence: Patient maintains steady eye contact with camera; facial muscles show no overt signs of distress, confusion, or affective flattening.

visual_findings.label: Gaze and Attention
visual_findings.summary: Consistent visual focus on camera; no signs of disengagement or wandering gaze.
visual_findings.evidence: Patient’s eyes remain directed toward the camera throughout the clip, indicating sustained attention.

body_findings.label: Posture and Movement
body_findings.summary: Minimal body movement; hand resting near chin/cheek in a contemplative pose.
body_findings.evidence: Patient remains seated and relatively still; no fidgeting, restlessness, or signs of motor impairment.

voice_findings.label: Speech Fluency
voice_findings.summary: Speech is fluent, with no pauses, repetitions, or word-finding difficulties observed.
voice_findings.evidence: Patient speaks in complete sentences with natural pacing; no hesitations or disfluencies detected.

voice_findings.label: Vocal Tone and Clarity
voice_findings.summary: Clear articulation and consistent vocal volume; no signs of dysarthria or vocal tremor.
voice_findings.evidence: Speech is easily understood; pitch and volume remain stable throughout the clip.

content_findings.label: Self-Reported Activities
content_findings.summary: Patient describes work tasks and location without signs of confusion or memory lapse.
content_findings.evidence: Patient states: 'I’m in my bedroom... working on testing and integration... all by myself.' No indication of disorientation or task confusion.

screening_summary: The patient demonstrates coherent speech, stable attention, and appropriate emotional expression. No observable signs of cognitive impairment or functional difficulty are present in this single clip.
evidence_against_risk: Fluent speech without disfluencies or word-finding difficulties.
Stable gaze and posture indicating sustained attention.
No signs of emotional dysregulation or affective flattening.
Self-reported activities are described clearly and contextually appropriately.
alternative_explanations: The patient may be fatigued or relaxed, which could explain minimal movement and neutral affect.
The setting (bedroom) and casual delivery may reflect informal recording conditions rather than clinical impairment.
emotional_assessment_findings: Neutral affect with no observable signs of anxiety, frustration, or apathy.
No emotional lability or inappropriate emotional responses detected.
risk_control_suggestions: Consider follow-up if additional behavioral or cognitive concerns emerge in future assessments.
visit_recommendation: Routine follow-up or no further action at this time.
future_risk_trend_summary: Insufficient data to predict future cognitive decline from a single clip.
context_notes: This is a single-clinic screening video; longitudinal assessment is needed for reliable cognitive evaluation.
No clinical history or diagnostic context is provided in the clip.
disclaimer: Research demo only. This output is not a diagnosis and must not be used as a standalone medical decision.
